Background summary:
陈先生于2010年至2022年从深圳交通中学毕业，在香港上市公司担任财务分析师。
He joined the group in 2014 and led several cross-border payment projects across Asia.
His English and Chinese communication skills are used daily in investor relations.
他负责协调香港、内地和新加坡的资金流动，并监督外汇对冲策略。
The customer has strong compliance awareness and requests detailed daily reports.
他喜欢在周末浏览财经新闻，尤其关注人民币汇率和美国联储政策。
A recent audit found no exceptions for the past twelve months.

Transaction note:
The customer requested a wire transfer of USD [AMOUNT] to account [ACCOUNT] at Bank of Pacific.
请在[DATE]前完成，并发送 confirmation email 到 [EMAIL].
The payment is part of a quarterly supplier settlement for logistics services.
本次付款用于结算 [YEAR] 年第一季度冷链物流服务费用。
The beneficiary is registered as [BENEFICIARY_NAME].
The remittance instruction includes a SWIFT code: [SWIFT].
请确保交易备注中写明 invoice number [INVOICE_NUMBER].
The client prefers the beneficiary address in English and Chinese.
客户要求受益人为英文和中文地址同时列出。
The wire should execute on the next banking day after approval.
汇款应在审批完成后的下一个工作日发出。

确认使用的汇率并附上汇率表。
Use transaction code [TRANSACTION_CODE] for internal tracking.
内部跟踪代码为 [TRANSACTION_CODE].
Legal and compliance notes:
Ensure KYC documents are current and verified for the beneficiary.
确保受益人的 KYC 文件齐全且已验证。
The client requires a copy of the anti-money laundering certification.
客户要求提供反洗钱认证复印件。
Check whether the transfer exceeds the daily limit of USD 100,000.
检查本次交易是否超过每日 100,000 美元限额。
If there is any exception, escalate to the regional compliance head.
如有任何例外情况，请上报区域合规负责人。
Maintain a record of all supporting invoices and communication.
保留所有支持性发票和沟通记录。
The company must report cross-border transfers over HKD 800,000.
公司需报告超过 800,000 港元的跨境转账。
